commands.command: P7B public forbidden scan for UnsupportedPlaybackRate and catch-all dependency tokens
commands.summary: No UnsupportedPlaybackRate token and no forbidden dependency tokens found in public P7 headers.
Graph state, error, severity, and generation stamp public value contracts compiled and passed defaults.

allowed_operations_checked: Layered error, evidence reason, architecture failure, and severity enums are separate
Graph states include NotCreated, transient transport states, recovery, failure, closing, and closed states
forbidden_operations_checked: No single catch-all error enum for user errors, evidence, and architecture failures
No UnsupportedPlaybackRate in P7 public errors
No generation wrap user-facing runtime error
exit_criteria_covered: G5 state/error public contract preliminary coverage
not_verified_boundaries: State transition legality is implemented and tested in P7C, not in P7B public headers
